description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 4 hrs 16 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 2 mins. His tracked work was mostly in Java (52%), along with Markdown (19%) and other languages (27%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories are listed in the data.
